first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's extensive experience, AI agent work, and seniority, while also noting the same minor concerns (lack of Nest.js/Kotlin, confusing dates). The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any judgment based on the change in job locations.
